.mobile-cart-header__right-part-wrapper-gH2z { margin-left: auto; } .mobile-cart-header__close-button-E4pp { padding: calc(var(--spacing_x1) * .5); color: var(--color-icotex-normal); cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; } .mobile-cart-settings-tdtt { box-sizing: border-box; padding: var(--spacing_x5) 0 0 0; grid-template-rows: auto 1fr auto; display: grid; } .mobile-cart-settings__wrapper-O616 { max-height: calc(100% - var(--ll_mobile-betslip-bottom-sheet_top-offset)); } .mobile-cart-settings__header-gNpV { padding: var(--spacing_x2) calc(var(--spacing_x1) * 5.5); } .mobile-cart-settings__close-button-CKMO { padding: calc(var(--spacing_x1) * .5); color: var(--color-icotex-normal); cursor: pointer; } .mobile-cart-T2J2 { padding: var(--spacing_x4) var(--betslip_inline-padding); background: var(--color-surface-zero); flex-direction: column; display: flex; } .mobile-cart__wrapper-qk9o { --ll_mobile-betslip-bottom-sheet_top-offset: var(--spacing_x6); max-height: calc(100% - var(--ll_mobile-betslip-bottom-sheet_top-offset)); } .mobile-cart-entry-button-odd-gpoR { white-space: nowrap; text-overflow: ellipsis; margin-left: var(--spacing_x4); color: var(--color-icotex-white-fixed); overflow: hidden; } .mobile-cart-entry-button-odd_increased-gsog { color: var(--color-icotex-action-fixed); animation: 5s linear 0s 1 normal none running change-odd-5rYN; } .mobile-cart-entry-button-odd_decreased--A24 { color: var(--color-icotex-warning-fixed); animation: 5s linear 0s 1 normal none running change-odd-5rYN; } @keyframes change-odd-5rYN { 0%, 20%, 40%, 60%, 80%, 100% { opacity: 0.15; } 10%, 30%, 50%, 70%, 90% { opacity: 1; } } .mobile-cart-entry-button-6Ioy { bottom: var(--spacing_x13); z-index: 2; width: calc(100vw - var(--spacing_x2) * 2); max-width: 768px; padding-top: ; padding-right: ; padding-left: ; padding-bottom: var(--spacing_x6); background-color: var(--color-surface-alfa-90-basket-fixed); border-radius: var(--radius-3) var(--radius-3) 0 0; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); transition: var(--animation_timing) transform; border: none; position: fixed; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%); } @supports .auth-buttons-4WFD, :root[data-ls-layout="desktop"] .auth-buttons-4WFD { padding: var(--spacing_x2) 0 0; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-radius: 0px; } .auth-buttons__registration-hfPf { color: var(--color-outline-border-lowest); border-color: var(--color-outline-border-lowest); } .bet-types-switcher-tab-qyDh { width: 33.3333%; } .bet-types-switcher-PbzW { width: 100%; margin-bottom: var(--spacing_x2); } :root[data-ls-layout="wideDesktop"] .bet-types-switcher-PbzW, :root[data-ls-layout="desktop"] .bet-types-switcher-PbzW { margin-bottom: var(--spacing_x1); } .bet-odd-active-XoZG { --ll-animation: blink-3Jfx 1s ease-in-out infinite; color: var(--color-icotex-normal); white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; } .bet-odd-active_increased-XD-e { color: var(--color-icotex-success); animation: var(--ll-animation); } .bet-odd-active_decreased-kShX { color: var(--color-icotex-error-fixed); animation: var(--ll-animation); } @keyframes blink-3Jfx { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.7; } } .bet-odd-locked-7Kgj { flex-shrink: 0; } .bet-start-date-Ivou { white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; } .bet-title-EhOP { -webkit-line-clamp: 2; text-overflow: ellipsis; user-select: auto; } #chatFieldReactContentEditable { user-select: text; } button, input, body { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; } button { margin: var(--spacing_none); padding: var(--spacing_none); background-color: inherit; border: none; border-radius: 0px; } ul, li { margin: var(--spacing_none); padding: var(--spacing_none); list-style: none; } a, input { outline: 0px; } a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; } a:visited::after { border-bottom: rgb(208, 208, 208); } img { border: 0px; } input[type="checkbox"] { box-sizing: border-box; border: solid 2px var(--green-90); appearance: none; background: 50% center / 0px 0px no-repeat rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 3px; width: 20px; min-width: 20px; height: 20px; display: block; position: relative; } input[type="checkbox"][disabled] { opacity: 0.25; background: rgb(221, 221, 221); } input[type="checkbox"]:checked { background-image: ; background-position-x: ; background-position-y: ; background-repeat: ; background-attachment: ; background-origin: ; background-clip: ; background-color: ; background-size: 16px; } input[type="radio"] { box-sizing: border-box; appearance: none; background: 50% center / 0px 0px no-repeat rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 2px solid rgb(0, 155, 105); border-radius: 50%; width: 20px; min-width: 20px; height: 20px; display: block; position: relative; } input[type="radio"]:checked::before { content: ""; background: rgb(0, 155, 105); border-radius: 50%; width: 10px; height: 10px; position: absolute; top: 3px; left: 3px; } input:-webkit-autofill { color: var(--ll_text-color,inherit) !important; -webkit-text-fill-color: var(--ll_text-color,inherit) !important; transition: background-color 600000s, color 600000s !important; } input:-webkit-autofill:focus { color: var(--ll_text-color,inherit) !important; -webkit-text-fill-color: var(--ll_text-color,inherit) !important; transition: background-color 600000s, color 600000s video)) { display: none; } } @layer base { ::-webkit-backdrop { box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } *, ::after, ::before { box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } ::backdrop { box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } ::-webkit-file-upload-button { box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } ::file-selector-button { box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } html, :host { text-size-adjust: 100%; tab-size: 4; line-height: 1.5; font-family: var(--default-font-family,ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif,"Apple Color Emoji","Segoe UI Emoji","Segoe UI Symbol","Noto Color Emoji"); font-feature-settings: var(--default-font-feature-settings,normal); font-variation-settings: var(--default-font-variation-settings,normal); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } hr { height: 0px; color: inherit; border-top-width: 1px; } abbr:where([title]) { text-decoration: underline dotted; } h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { font-size: inherit; font-weight: inherit; } a { color: inherit; text-decoration: inherit; } b, strong { font-weight: bolder; } code, kbd, samp, pre { font-family: var(--default-mono-font-family,ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,Monaco,Consolas,"Liberation Mono","Courier New",monospace); font-feature-settings: var(--default-mono-font-feature-settings,normal); font-variation-settings: var(--default-mono-font-variation-settings,normal); font-size: 1em; } small { font-size: 80%; } sub, sup { vertical-align: baseline; font-size: 75%; line-height: 0; position: relative; } sub { bottom: -0.25em; } sup { top: -0.5em; } table { text-indent: 0px; border-color: inherit; border-collapse: collapse; } progress { vertical-align: baseline; } summary { display: list-item; } ol, ul, menu { list-style: none; } img, svg, video, canvas, audio, iframe, embed, object { vertical-align: middle; display: block; } img, video { max-width: 100%; height: auto; } button, input, select, optgroup, textarea { font: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; color: inherit; opacity: 1; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-radius: 0px; } ::-webkit-file-upload-button { font: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; color: inherit; opacity: 1; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-radius: 0px; } ::file-selector-button { font: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; color: inherit; opacity: 1; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-radius: 0px; } :where(select:-webkit-any([multiple], [size])) optgroup { font-weight: bolder; } :where(select:is([multiple], [size])) optgroup { font-weight: bolder; } :where(select:-webkit-any([multiple], [size])) optgroup option { padding-inline-start: 20px; } :where(select:is([multiple], [size])) optgroup option { padding-inline-start: 20px; } ::-webkit-file-upload-button { margin-inline-end: 4px; } ::file-selector-button { margin-inline-end: 4px; } ::placeholder { opacity: 1; } @supports (not ((-webkit-appearance:-apple-pay-button))) or (contain-intrinsic-size:1px) { ::placeholder { color: currentcolor; } @supports (color:color-mix(in lab,red,red)) { ::placeholder { color: color-mix(currentcolor, transparent); } } } textarea { resize: vertical; } ::-webkit-search-decoration { appearance: none; } ::-webkit-date-and-time-value { [type="reset"], [type="submit"]) { appearance: button; } ::-webkit-file-upload-button { appearance: button; } ::file-selector-button { appearance: button; } ::-webkit-inner-spin-button { height: auto; } ::-webkit-outer-spin-button { height: auto; } [hidden]:where(:not([hidden="until-found"])) { display: none !important; } * { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } var(--radix-accordion-content-height); } } @keyframes slideUp { 0% { height: var(--radix-accordion-content-height); } 100% { height: 0px; } } @keyframes dot-flashing { 0% { opacity: 1; } 75%, 100% { opacity: 0.5; } } @keyframes sliding-shadow { 0% { transform: translate(-100%); } 100% { transform: translate(170%); } } .skeleton-animated::after { animation: 1.5s ease 0s infinite alternate none .swiper { z-index: 1; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; padding: 0px; list-style: none; display: block; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .swiper-vertical > .swiper-wrapper { flex-direction: column; } .swiper-wrapper { z-index: 1; width: 100%; height: 100%; transition-property: transform; transition-timing-function: var(--swiper-wrapper-transition-timing-function,initial); box-sizing: content-box; display: flex; position: relative; } .swiper-android .swiper-slide, .swiper-ios .swiper-slide, .swiper-wrapper { transform: translateZ(0px); } .swiper-horizontal { touch-action: pan-y; } .swiper-vertical { touch-action: pan-x; } .swiper-slide { flex-shrink: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; transition-property: transform; display: block; position: relative; } .swiper-slide-invisible-blank { visibility: hidden; } .swiper-autoheight, .swiper-autoheight .swiper-slide { height: auto; } .swiper-autoheight .swiper-wrapper { align-items: flex-start; transition-property: transform, height; } .swiper-backface-hidden .swiper-slide { backface-visibility: hidden; transform: translateZ(0px); } .swiper-3d.swiper-css-mode .swiper-wrapper { perspective: 1200px; } .swiper-3d .swiper-wrapper { transform-style: preserve-3d; } .swiper-3d { perspective: 1200px; } .swiper-3d .swiper-slide, .swiper-3d .swiper-cube-shadow { transform-style: preserve-3d; } .swiper-css-mode > .swiper-wrapper { scrollbar-width: none; overflow: auto; } .swiper-css-mode > .swiper-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; } .swiper-css-mode > .swiper-wrapper > .swiper-slide { scroll-snap-align: start; } .swiper-css-mode.swiper-horizontal > .swiper-wrapper { scroll-snap-type: x mandatory; } .swiper-css-mode.swiper-vertical > .swiper-wrapper { scroll-snap-type: y mandatory; } .swiper-css-mode.swiper-free-mode > .swiper-wrapper { scroll-snap-type: none; } .swiper-css-mode.swiper-free-mode > .swiper-wrapper > .swiper-slide { scroll-snap-align: none; } .swiper-css-mode.swiper-centered > .swiper-wrapper::before { content: ""; flex-shrink: 0; order: 9999; } .swiper-css-mode.swiper-centered > .swiper-wrapper > .swiper-slide { .swiper-css-mode.swiper-centered.swiper-vertical > .swiper-wrapper::before { width: 100%; min-width: 1px; height: var(--swiper-centered-offset-after); } .swiper-3d .swiper-slide-shadow, .swiper-3d .swiper-slide-shadow-left, .swiper-3d .swiper-slide-shadow-right, .swiper-3d .swiper-slide-shadow-top, .swiper-3d .swiper-slide-shadow-bottom { pointer-events: none; z-index: 10; width: 100%; height: false; } @property --tw-content { syntax: "*"; inherits: false; initial-value: ""; } @keyframes spin { 100% { transform: rotate(360deg); } } .rdp-root { --rdp-accent-color: blue; --rdp-accent-background-color: #f0f0ff; --rdp-day-height: 44px; --rdp-day-width: 44px; --rdp-day_button-border-radius: 100%; --rdp-day_button-border: 2px solid transparent; --rdp-day_button-height: 42px; --rdp-day_button-width: 42px; --rdp-selected-border: 2px solid var(--rdp-accent-color); --rdp-disabled-opacity: .5; --rdp-outside-opacity: .75; --rdp-today-color: var(--rdp-accent-color); --rdp-dropdown-gap: .5rem; --rdp-months-gap: 2rem; --rdp-nav_button-disabled-opacity: .5; --rdp-nav_button-height: 2.25rem; --rdp-nav_button-width: 2.25rem; --rdp-nav-height: 2.75rem; --rdp-range_middle-background-color: var(--rdp-accent-background-color); --rdp-range_middle-color: inherit; --rdp-range_start-color: white; --rdp-range_start-background: linear-gradient(var(--rdp-gradient-direction), transparent 50%, var(--rdp-range_middle-background-color) 50%); --rdp-range_start-date-background-color: var(--rdp-accent-color); --rdp-range_end-background: linear-gradient(var(--rdp-gradient-direction), var(--rdp-range_middle-background-color) 50%, transparent 50%); --rdp-range_end-color: white; --rdp-range_end-date-background-color: var(--rdp-accent-color); --rdp-week_number-border-radius: 100%; --rdp-week_number-border: 2px solid transparent; --rdp-week_number-height: var(--rdp-day-height); --rdp-week_number-opacity: .75; --rdp-week_number-width: var(--rdp-day-width); --rdp-weeknumber-text-align: center; --rdp-weekday-opacity: .75; --rdp-weekday-padding: .5rem 0rem; --rdp-weekday-text-align: center; --rdp-gradient-direction: 90deg; --rdp-animation_duration: .3s; --rdp-animation_timing: cubic-bezier(.4, 0, .2, 1); } .rdp-root[dir="rtl"] { --rdp-gradient-direction: -90deg; } .rdp-root[data-broadcast-calendar="true"] { --rdp-outside-opacity: unset; } .rdp-root { box-sizing: border-box; position: relative; } .rdp-root * { box-sizing: border-box; } .rdp-day { width: var(--rdp-day-width); height: var(--rdp-day-height); text-align: center; } .rdp-day_button { cursor: pointer; font: inherit; color: inherit; width: var(--rdp-day_button-width); height: .static-block-pCcu[data-id="tryAgain"] a { color: rgb(0, 154, 108); } .static-block-pCcu[data-id="about"], .static-block-pCcu[data-id="sovAgreement"], .static-block-pCcu[data-id="requestSend"] { padding: 8px 0px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 18px; } .static-block-pCcu[data-id="about"] p, .static-block-pCcu[data-id="sovAgreement"] p, .static-block-pCcu[data-id="requestSend"] p { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); padding: 8px 15px; } .static-block-pCcu[data-id="about"] a, .static-block-pCcu[data-id="sovAgreement"] a, .static-block-pCcu[data-id="requestSend"] a { color: rgb(0, 154, 108); } .static-block-pCcu[data-id="expiredPasswordText"] { font-size: 14px; line-height: 18px; } .static-block-pCcu[data-id="expiredPasswordText"] p { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); margin: 8px 0px; } .static-block-pCcu[data-id="expiredPasswordText"] a { color: rgb(0, 154, 108); } .static-block-pCcu[data-id="expiredPasswordText"] h3 { font-weight: var(--font_regular); margin: 15px 0px; font-size: 18px; line-height: 20px; } .static-block-pCcu[data-id="manualStep1"], .static-block-pCcu[data-id="manualStep2"], .static-block-pCcu[data-id="manualStep3"], .static-block-pCcu[data-id="manualStep4"] { cid:css-77a8c982-5a27-4be6-a4fe-29e4b9ea7ada@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; .MuiTooltip-popper { z-index: 1500; pointer-events: none; } .MuiTooltip-popperInteractive { pointer-events: auto; } .MuiTooltip-popperArrow[x-placement*="bottom"] .MuiTooltip-arrow { top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 2em; height: 1em; margin-top: -0.95em; margin-left: 4px; margin-right: 4px; } .MuiTooltip-popperArrow[x-placement*="top"] .MuiTooltip-arrow { left: 0px; width: 2em; bottom: 0px; height: 1em; margin-left: 4px; margin-right: 4px; margin-bottom: -0.95em; } .MuiTooltip-popperArrow[x-placement*="right"] .MuiTooltip-arrow { left: 0px; width: 1em; height: 2em; margin-top: 4px; margin-left: -0.95em; margin-bottom: 4px; } .MuiTooltip-popperArrow[x-placement*="left"] .MuiTooltip-arrow { right: 0px; width: 1em; height: 2em; margin-top: 4px; margin-right: -0.95em; margin-bottom: 4px; } .MuiTooltip-popperArrow[x-placement*="left"] .MuiTooltip-arrow::before { border-color: transparent transparent transparent currentcolor; border-width: 1em 0px 1em 1em; } .MuiTooltip-popperArrow[x-placement*="right"] .MuiTooltip-arrow::before { border-color: transparent currentcolor transparent transparent; border-width: 1em 1em 1em 0px; } .MuiTooltip-popperArrow[x-placement*="top"] .MuiTooltip-arrow::before { border-color: currentcolor transparent transparent; border-width: 1em 1em 0px; } .MuiTooltip-popperArrow[x-placement*="bottom"] .MuiTooltip-arrow::before { border-color: transparent transparent currentcolor; border-width: 0px 1em 1em; } .MuiTooltip-tooltip { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); padding: 4px 8px; font-size: 0.625rem; max-width: 300px; overflow-wrap: break-word; font-family: Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4em; border-radius: 4px; background-color: rgba(97, 97, 97, 0.9); } .MuiTooltip-tooltipArrow { margin: 0px; position: relative; } .MuiTooltip-arrow { color: rgba(97, 97, 97, 0.9); position: absolute; font-size: 6px; } .MuiTooltip-arrow::before { width: 0px; height: 0px; margin: auto; content: ""; display: block; border-style: solid; } .MuiTooltip-touch { padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.14286em; } .MuiTooltip-tooltipPlacementLeft { margin: 0px 24px; transform-origin: right center; } @media (min-width: 600px) { .MuiTooltip-tooltipPlacementLeft { margin: 0px 14px; } } .MuiTooltip-tooltipPlacementRight { margin: 0px 24px; transform-origin: left center; } @media (min-width: 600px) { .MuiTooltip-tooltipPlacementRight { margin: 0px 14px; } } .MuiTooltip-tooltipPlacementTop { margin: 24px 0px; transform-origin: center bottom; } @media (min-width: 600px) { .MuiTooltip-tooltipPlacementTop { margin: 14px 0px; } } .MuiTooltip-tooltipPlacementBottom { margin: 24px 0px; transform-origin: center top; } @media (min-width: 600px) { .MuiTooltip-tooltipPlacementBottom { margin: 14px 0px; } } cid:css-e2b2fab7-4361-4409-9f5d-0a947b8c94f2@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; html { --cascana-main-color: #435fc1; --cascana-hover-color: #5574e2; } .cascana-chat-widget { font-size: 16px; } .cascana-chat-widget form { max-width: 800px; margin: auto; } .cascana-chat-widget button, .cascana-chat-widget a { font-size: 13px; } #overlay { position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; background-color: gray; opacity: 0.5; z-index: 10; } #spinner { z-index: 11; position: fixed; bottom: 2rem; width: 100%; } .custom-file-label { overflow: hidden; } .btn-primary { background-color: var(--cascana-main-color); border-color: var(--cascana-main-color); } .btn-primary:hover { background-color: var(--cascana-hover-color); border-color: var(--cascana-hover-color); } #conversejs, #conversejs-bg, .converse-fullscreen { --redder-orange: var(--cascana-main-color) !important; } #conversejs .badge-primary, #conversejs .btn-primary, #conversejs .button-primary { --primary-color: var(--redder-orange); --primary-color-dark: var(--cascana-hover-color); } .custom-file-label::after { content: "–í—ã–±—Ä–∞—Ç—å" !important; } @-webkit-keyframes blink { 0% { opacity: 0.2; } 20% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0.2; } } @keyframes blink { 0% { opacity: 0.2; } 20% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0.2; } } @-webkit-keyframes recordBlink { 0% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.2; } 100% { opacity: 1; } } @keyframes recordBlink { 0% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.2; } 100% { opacity: 1; } } .typing { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; height: 19px; margin: 0px; } .typing span { animation-name: blink; animation-duration: 1.4s; animation-iteration-count: infinite; animation-fill-mode: both; display: block; width: 5px; height: 5px; background-color: rgb(141, 149, 155); border-radius: 50%; } .typing span:not(:last-child) { margin-right: 3px; } .typing span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; } .typing span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.4s; } @-webkit-keyframes shake { 10%, 90% { margin-left: -1px; } 20%, 80% { margin-left: 2px; } 30%, 50%, 70% { margin-left: -4px; } 40%, 60% { margin-left: 4px; } } @keyframes shake { 10%, 90% { margin-left: -1px; } 20%, 80% { margin-left: 2px; } 30%, 50%, 70% { margin-left: -4px; } 40%, 60% { margin-left: 4px; } } @-webkit-keyframes scale { 50% { transform: scale(1.2); } 100% { transform: scale(0.8); } } @keyframes scale { 50% { transform: scale(1.2); } 100% { transform: scale(0.8); } } .emoji_alt { font-size: 20px; } @-webkit-keyframes rotate { 100% { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @keyframes rotate { 100% { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @-webkit-keyframes dash { 0% { stroke-dasharray: 1, 150; stroke-dashoffset: 0; } 50% { stroke-dasharray: 90, 150; stroke-dashoffset: -35; } 100% { stroke-dasharray: 90, 150; stroke-dashoffset: -124; } } @keyframes dash { 0% { stroke-dasharray: 1, 150; stroke-dashoffset: 0; } 50% { stroke-dasharray: 90, 150; stroke-dashoffset: -35; } 100% { stroke-dasharray: 90, 150; stroke-dashoffset: -124; } } .grecaptcha-badge { visibility: hidden; } ------MultipartBoundary--iSDo7l9MRpCm3uuKGq76cXfgx4OhAVmMtO1gyaRSsE---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: cid:css-ba543757-d38a-4295-a478-da265457c6b8@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; :root { --body_background-color: #d9dde5; --start-loader: #c1c1c1; --start-mask: #84f8b9; background-color: var(--body_background-color); } :root[data-ls-theme="dark"] { --body_background-color: #24282f; --start-loader: #757575; --start-mask: #fff; } #start-loader { align-items: center; display: flex; height: 100vh; justify-content: center; left: 0px; max-height: 100svh; max-width: 100svw; opacity: 1; position: fixed; top: 0px; width: 100vw; z-index: 1; transform: scale3d(1, 1, 1); } #ellipse1 { position: absolute; animation: 1.2s linear 0s infinite normal none running load1; } #ellipse2 { position: absolute; animation: 1.2s linear 0s infinite normal none running load2; } #ellipse3 { position: absolute; animation: 1.2s linear 0s infinite normal none running load3; } #ellipse4 { position: absolute; transform: translate3d(165px, -5px, 0px) scale3d(0.7, 0.7, 0.7) rotate3d(0, 0, 1, -45deg); animation: 1.2s linear 0s infinite normal none running load4; } #ellipse5 { position: absolute; transform: translate3d(-5px, 57px, 0px) scale3d(0.7, 0.7, 0.7) rotate3d(0, 0, 1, -45deg); animation: 1.2s linear 0s infinite normal none running load5; } @keyframes load1 { 0% { transform: translate3d(-30px, 7px, 0px) scale3d(1, 1, 1) rotate3d(0, 0, 1, -20deg); } 50% { transform: translate3d(80px, 26px, 0px) scale3d(1.3, 1.3, 1.3) rotate3d(0, 0, 1, 0deg); } 100% { transform: translate3d(190px, 45px, 0px) scale3d(1, 1, 1) rotate3d(0, 0, 1, -20deg); } } @keyframes load2 { 0% { transform: translate3d(190px, 45px, 0px) scale3d(1, 1, 1) rotate3d(0, 0, 1, -20deg); } 100% { transform: translate3d(410px, 65px, 0px) scale3d(1, 1, 1) rotate3d(0, 0, 1, -60deg); } } @keyframes load3 { 0% { transform: translate3d(-250px, -39px, 0px) scale3d(1, 1, 1) rotate3d(0, 0, 1, -20deg); } 100% { transform: translate3d(-30px, 7px, 0px) scale3d(1, 1, 1) rotate3d(0, 0, 1, -60deg); } } @keyframes load4 { 0% { opacity: 0; } 25% { opacity: 0.75; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } 75% { opacity: 0.5; } 100% { opacity: 0; } } @keyframes load5 { 0% { opacity: 0; } 25% { opacity: 0.5; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } 75% { opacity: 0.75; } 100% { opacity: 0; } } ------MultipartBoundary--iSDo7l9MRpCm3uuKGq76cXfgx4OhAVmMtO1gyaRSsE---- Content-Type: text/html Content-ID: Content-Transfer-Encoding:
